create: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `groups` (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, year_id INT NOT NULL, course_id INT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (year_id) REFERENCES years(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (course_id) REFERENCES courses(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);
update: UPDATE `groups` SET name = %s, year_id = %s, course_id = %s WHERE id = %s;

fetch.by_id: SELECT id, name, year_id, course_id FROM `groups` WHERE id = %s;
fetch.by_name: SELECT id, name, year_id, course_id FROM `groups` WHERE name = %s;
fetch.by_year: SELECT id, name, year_id, course_id FROM `groups` WHERE year_id = %s;
fetch.by_year_course: SELECT id, name, year_id, course_id FROM `groups` WHERE year_id = %s AND course_id = %s;
fetch.by_name_year_course: SELECT id, name, year_id, course_id FROM `groups` WHERE name = %s AND year_id = %s AND course_id = %s;
fetch.all: SELECT id, name, year_id, course_id FROM `groups`;
